market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Railway Cottage Horsforth (20% off median price)
Spacious Railway Cottage Great for Outdoors
analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience this fully private 4-guest Railway Cottage in Horsforth’s vibrant community. Strategically priced at £130/night (20% below the local market median), this entire home offers exceptional value for families and travelers seeking comfort. Situated in a central location, it combines modern convenience with historical charm. While we’re continually improving our amenities list, guests can request additional facilities for a tailored stay. With 30 open nights ahead, now is the perfect time to claim this underpriced gem in high-demand Horsforth. *Note: Host Chris is new to hosting and committed to excellence.*
analysis.photo_order_rec: Start with a clean exterior shot of the cottage to establish trust, followed by the living room to showcase space. Outdoor areas should be prioritized if available.
key_diagnosis: Title underperforms at 25% length (max 50 chars, 0 chars used for property type/kindness flags)
Description score at rock-bottom 1/10 due to no content — critical for converting price-competitive guests
Amenities score 1/10 lacks 3 high-value categories (Outdoor, Parking, Entertainment) that could boost £130 rate’s competitiveness
analysis.outreach_hook: £130 rate is -16% vs £154.60 median yet achieves 66.3% occupancy (vs 47.8% cohort average) – this underpricing suggests massive revenue untapped.
